block_02: We would like to inform you that Memorial Day in the US and the Spring Bank Holiday in the UK will be observed on May 31, 2021. Due to the holidays, IQ Option’s trading schedule will be subject to changes.
block_03: For your convenience, changes to the trading schedule are highlighted below. All times are in UTC.
block_24: Binary and Digital Options markets will operate as usual. Depending on market conditions, Over the Counter (OTC) assets may become available for trading.
block_26: The FX Options market will open as usual, but may close early depending on market conditions.
block_27: Should you have any questions, do not hesitate to get in touch with our Support team.
